title: Aura Code Intelligence
description: Settings for Aura Code Intelligence JupyterLab extension

serverUrl.title: Server URL
serverUrl.description: URL of the Aura API server

showGraphContext.title: Show Graph Context
showGraphContext.description: Show GraphRAG code context panel (key differentiator)

enableSecretsDetection.title: Enable Secrets Detection
enableSecretsDetection.description: Check for secrets before sharing notebooks

graphDepth.title: Graph Depth
graphDepth.description: Default traversal depth for code context graph
